entry.title: New: RES24-232 (Honolulu) — FILE
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL AND RELATED EXPENSES, VALUED AT AN ESTIMATED $6,160, TO THE CITY FROM THE INTERNATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF PLUMBING AND MECHANICAL OFFICIALS (IAPMO), HAWAII CHAPTER FOR TWO DEPARTMENT OF PLANNING AND PERMITTING (DPP) EMPLOYEES TO ATTEND THE 2024 IAPMO ANNUAL EDUCATION AND BUSINESS CONFERENCE IN LAS VEGAS, NEVADA, SEPTEMBER 22-26, 2024.

Latest action: Filed pursuant to ROH SEC 1-2.5 which sets a one-year filing period on pending resolutions.

View on the council site
